content.question: Welcome to the Craft Silicon booth.
content.subtext: Counties leave revenue on the table every day — because systems don't talk to each other. We fix that. Let's start with your name.
content.label: FULL NAME

content.question: Nice to meet you, {name}. Where do you work?
content.subtext: Knowing your organisation tells us which platform is most relevant — and who on our team should reach out after the conference.
content.label: ORGANISATION / ROLE
content.placeholder: e.g. Homa Bay County / Director of Revenue

proof_points.title: I work in revenue collection
proof_points.text: OSR automation, land rates, SBP, market fees — reconciled to IFMIS. Live in 4 counties.

proof_points.title: I work in HR or payroll
proof_points.text: Biometric payroll, ghost-worker elimination, KDSP II KRA 2 aligned.

proof_points.title: I work in health services
proof_points.text: DHA-certified HMIS, SHA-integrated at point of care. Level 1–6 facility coverage.

content.question: Where should we send your brief, {name}?
content.subtext: One follow-up. Relevant to your county's situation. No noise.

proof_card.title: Personalised to your county
proof_card.text: Includes deployment examples from live counties and relevant product modules

content.question: Which area sparks your interest, {name}?
content.subtext: Select one or more. Your brief will be built around them.

options.label: Revenue Growth
options.description: OSR automation — collect more, leak less, reconcile to IFMIS by morning. Live in 4 counties.
options.proof: Live in Homa Bay, Meru, Kajiado & Mandera

feedback.subtext: Our county revenue team is preparing your brief. Expect a message within 24 hours.

options.label: HR & Payroll
options.description: Eliminate ghost workers. Pass your next payroll audit. KDSP II KRA 2 evidence built in.
options.proof: 12 modules · SHA, NSSF, KRA, Housing Levy

feedback.subtext: Our HR and payroll team will reach out with your KDSP II brief shortly.

options.label: Health Systems
options.description: Every patient treated. Every SHA claim paid. DHA-certified, Level 1–6 ready.

feedback.subtext: Our health systems team will prepare your SHA and HMIS brief and be in touch soon.

options.label: Livestock & Trade
options.description: Every animal verified. Every trade receipted. M-Pesa escrow, movement permits, no cash risk.

feedback.subtext: The Flockr team will send you a county pilot brief and reach out shortly.

content.skip_cta: Not sure yet — just connect me

content.headline:
You're connected,
{name}.
content.subtext: Your personalised brief is being prepared. A member of our team will reach out shortly to schedule your demo.
content.multi_subtext: Our specialist teams are preparing your tailored briefs based on your selected interests. Expect a message within 24 hours.
content.skip_subtext: A member of the Craft Silicon team will be in touch with a tailored brief within 24 hours.
next_steps: Our team reviews your organisation and selected interest
You receive a personalised brief within 24 hours
We schedule a discovery call or send product materials — your call
